data.body: Remediated + committed as 2168ae18e. Corrected llm-framework.md child-closure section, CLAUDE.md completion-gate note, workflow-engine.md summary, and the completion-verification.yaml description to the post-30c2ef3ad blocking-vs-certification-withholding semantics; documented the certifiable field. Gate YAML still loads/validates; 66 tests green. Awaiting Gerrit landing.
